name: veluza
flavor_texts: When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor.
Veluza has excellent regenerative capabilities. It sheds spare flesh from its body to boost its agility, then charges at its prey.
text: Veluza is the Jettison Pokémon. It is a water and psychic-type Pokémon. Abilities: mold-breaker, sharpness (hidden). Base stats — HP: 90, Attack: 102, Defense: 73, Sp. Atk: 78, Sp. Def: 65, Speed: 70. Evolution line: veluza. Lore: When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor. Veluza has excellent regenerative capabilities. It sheds spare flesh from its body to boost its agility, then charges at its prey.
